model.prompt: List absolutely all German cities with more than 10,000 inhabitants. Return a JSON object containing an array 'locations', where each item has the 'location' (the city name in German). Start with the largest then move to smaller cities.

queryModel.prompt: Generate distinct search queries to find websites of companies offering {{industry}} in {{location}}. Use varied keyword strategies to find all relevant companies.

selectModel.prompt: Select only the official company websites of {{industry}} companies from the search results. If its not {{industry}}, exclude. Exclude directories (like Yelp, Yellow Pages, Google Maps), social media profiles, and aggregator sites. Only select direct company websites matching {{industry}}. We dont care in which city this company is.
